commits.content:
from pathlib import Path

root = Path('.').resolve()
ignore_files = {'workspace-dirs.txt', 'workspace-tree.txt', 'workspace-folder-structure.md', 'gen_workspace_structure.py'}
root_files = sorted([p.name for p in root.iterdir() if p.is_file() and p.name not in ignore_files])
lines = Path('workspace-dirs.txt').read_text(encoding='utf-8').splitlines()
root_tree = {}
for line in lines:
    rel = line.replace(str(root) + '\\', '')
    parts = rel.split('\\')
    node = root_tree
    for part in parts:
        node = node.setdefault(part, {})


def render(node, indent=0):
    out = []
    for name in sorted(node):
        out.append('  ' * indent + '- ' + name + '/')
        out.extend(render(node[name], indent + 1))
    return out

md = ['# Workspace Folder Structure', '', '## Root Files']
md.extend(f'- {name}' for name in root_files)
md.append('')
md.append('## Directories')
md.extend(render(root_tree))
Path('workspace-folder-structure.md').write_text('\n'.join(md), encoding='utf-8')
print('workspace-folder-structure.md generated')
